title: peaceful+
description: no monster in survival mod, except piglin and zombie villager in abandoned village. personal project, maybe no update but bug report is always welcome.
body:
no monsters in survival mod - please use survival mod(not peaceful) if you want hunger to deplete. this mod makes survival work like peaceful, so don't be confused. 
piglin is there, zombie villager will be only at abandoned village. monster drop items can be gathered by trade or craft.
